# Getting help

AscendOS is a design project, so "support" mostly means "let's talk about the
design."

- **Questions about the architecture or a decision:** open a
  [Discussion](https://github.com/AwaleSagar/ascendos/discussions).
- **You think something in the docs is wrong or unclear:** open a *Documentation*
  issue.
- **You want to propose a change:** see [CONTRIBUTING](CONTRIBUTING.md) and the
  [RFC process](../docs/rfcs/README.md).

Please don't expect runtime support — there is no runtime yet. If you're trying
to *run* AscendOS, see the note at the top of the [README](../README.md): it
doesn't boot, by design, for now.
